scripts.package:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb rpm
scripts.package:win:bundled-python: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.bundled-python.yml --win nsis
scripts.package:mac:bundled-python: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.bundled-python.yml --mac dmg zip
scripts.package:linux:bundled-python: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.bundled-python.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm
scripts.lint:audit: npm run lint:audit:react && npm run lint:audit:deprecation
scripts.electron: bash -lc 'if [ -z "${DISPLAY:-}" ] && command -v xvfb-run >/dev/null 2>&1; then ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 xvfb-run -a electron .; else ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 electron .; fi'
scripts.electron:dev: bash -lc 'if [ -z "${DISPLAY:-}" ] && command -v xvfb-run >/dev/null 2>&1; then WINDIE_DEV_UI=1 ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 xvfb-run -a electron .; else WINDIE_DEV_UI=1 ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 electron .; fi'
scripts.mock-memory-data: bash -lc 'if command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python src/main/python/dev_seed_mock_memory.py; else python3 src/main/python/dev_seed_mock_memory.py; fi'
scripts.electron:mock-memory-data: npm run mock-memory-data && npm run electron
